character.label: Character
character.description: Character identity, role, behavior, or arc-local status.

event.label: Event
event.description: Story event, scene state, battle beat, or arc action.

faction.label: Faction
faction.description: Crew, organization, kingdom, army, or local power structure.

item.label: Item
item.description: Object, ship, weapon, Devil Fruit, artifact, or named tool.

knowledge.label: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Who knows, believes, hides, or misunderstands arc-local information.

location.label: Location
location.description: Place, local condition, route, or geography.

relationship.label: Relationship
relationship.description: Social bond, trust state, rivalry, or crew dynamic.

rule.label: Rule
rule.description: Setting rule, power constraint, navigation rule, or social constraint.

secret.label: Secret
secret.description: Hidden identity, spoiler gate, dangerous knowledge, or delayed reveal.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.description: Context anchor, phase boundary, before/after rule, or chronology fact.

canon.label: Canon
canon.description: Primary One Piece manga/anime continuity for the selected deck.

anime-only.label: Anime Only
anime-only.description: Show-continuity material from anime-only arcs or filler episodes.
